hot_topics.summary: SoDEX testnet patch airdrop list released with loyalty rewards based on SoPoints tiers, claim opens May 8.

related_posts.content: ✅ SoDEX testnet patch airdrop list is here. A make-good drop — for those we missed, and for those who proved through appeals that they're real builders, not bots. 🔍 Check now → https://testnet.sodex.com/points 🎁 Claim opens on May 8, 12:00 UTC We added Loyalty Rewards (hint: extra $SOSO)   for those who have been building SoDEX with us since Day 1, starting from the  SoDEX testnet days. One more thing: your SoDEX status has value. The higher your SoPoints Tier, the more you get. 🥈 Silver → 🥇 Gold → 💎 Diamond Not on the list? Appeal here →  https://t.co/QAuXtmboLL Show us your number  👇 Let's see who the real builders are.

I got 500 $SOSO worth around $215 from Sodex after we made an appeal, as we were flagged as bots. Not bad at all, thanks to Sodex and the entire SOSO Value. Claiming in the next 9 days. Check Here 👇 ➡️ https://testnet.sodex.com/points Keep interacting SOSO S2 is gonna be massively crazy 🤪 in sha Allah. SOSO Value S2 snapshot in May 🙈

hot_topics.summary: Over 200 bug reports reviewed, extra SoPoints granted to eligible contributors.

related_posts.content: SoDEX has received and reviewed 200+ valid bug reports from the community. 🛡️ Mainnet bugs: 130+ reports 🌐 Testnet bugs: 70+ reports Eligible contributors have received in-app notifications, with extra SoPoints granted. Rewards are based on first valid submissions and verified bug reports. Thank you for helping make SoDEX stronger. 🧡 #SoDEX #SoSoValue #SoPoints

top_engaged_posts.content: SoSoValue SoDEX Testnet Airdrop 2 Claim is Live! SoSoValue Season 2. What most dont realize, more than just clicking & claiming is needed to maxmize your rewards.  Have you completed your:   - Daily Check-in - Daily Tasks      AND stayed active in the Ecosystem? (e.g. the research terminal, sodex and ssi?) With the info we got in the AMA last week, it got even clearer how genuine activity and contribution is far more important than pure farming.
